answers.name: Product T.1
answers.context: Subheading: E. PRODUCT INFORMATION. This field captures the requested dose of Skyrizi.

answers.name: Product T.2
answers.context: Subheading: E. PRODUCT INFORMATION. This field captures the requested frequency of Skyrizi.
answers.answer: Week 0, 4, 8 for induction; every 8 weeks for maintenance

answers.context: Subheading: F. DIAGNOSIS INFORMATION. This field captures any other relevant ICD codes for the diagnosis.

answers.name: Clinical CB.0
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about using the drug in combination with other biologics or targeted synthetic drugs.

answers.name: Clinical CB.1
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about using the drug in combination with other biologics or targeted synthetic drugs.

answers.name: Clinical CB.2
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the patient having received prior therapy associated with an increased risk of tuberculosis (TB).

answers.name: Clinical CB.3
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the patient having received prior therapy associated with an increased risk of tuberculosis (TB).

answers.name: Clinical CB.4
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the patient having had a tuberculosis (TB) test within 6 months of initiating therapy.

answers.name: Clinical CB.5
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the patient having had a tuberculosis (TB) test within 6 months of initiating therapy.

answers.name: Clinical CB.6
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that a PPD test was performed as part of the TB testing.

answers.name: Clinical CB.7
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that an interferon-release assay (IGRA) was performed as part of the TB testing.

answers.name: Clinical CB.8
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that a chest x-ray was performed as part of the TB testing.

answers.name: Clinical CB.9
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates a positive result for the tuberculosis (TB) test.

answers.name: Clinical CB.10
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates a negative result for the tuberculosis (TB) test.

answers.name: Clinical CB.11
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the result of the tuberculosis (TB) test is unknown.

answers.name: Clinical CB.12
answers.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has been initiated
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has been initiated.

answers.name: Clinical CB.13
answers.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has been completed
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has been completed.

answers.name: Clinical CB.14
answers.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has not been initiated
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has not been initiated.

answers.name: Clinical CB.15
answers.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has active TB.
